suggestionTypes.starProgressDesc: Push five-star runs to gold, or gain more stars.
suggestionTypes.varietyPackDesc: A mix of songs from different artists.
suggestionTypes.artistEssentialsDesc: A selection of songs by a single artist.
suggestionTypes.artistDiscoverDesc: Unplayed songs from a single artist.
suggestionTypes.sameNameDesc: Different tracks that share the same title.
suggestionTypes.almostEliteDesc: Top 5% — one good run could crack the top 1%.
suggestionTypes.percentilePushDesc: Close to the next percentile bracket.
suggestionTypes.staleSongsDesc: Songs you haven't played in a while.
suggestionTypes.percentileImproveDesc: Songs with room for percentile improvement.

suggestionCategories.fcTheseNextDesc: If you can get gold stars, you can FC it!
suggestionCategories.closeToFcDesc: Great runs to try and FC next!
suggestionCategories.pushToGoldDesc: Push these five-star runs to gold stars!
suggestionCategories.easyStarGainsDesc: Hit a new high score to get even more stars on these songs!
suggestionCategories.trySomethingNewDesc: Songs you haven't played on any instrument yet.
suggestionCategories.songsNamedDesc: Different tracks sharing the same title.
suggestionCategories.closeToFcVariantsDesc: FC these same-name songs for a unique achievement!
suggestionCategories.almostEliteDesc: You're in the top 5% on these — one good run could crack the top 1%.
suggestionCategories.percentilePushDesc: These scores are close to the next percentile bracket — replay them to climb.
suggestionCategories.competitiveImprovementsDesc: Songs where your percentile is the same across all instruments. An improvement on any instrument moves you up everywhere.
suggestionCategories.improveRankingsDesc: A varied mix of {{instrument}} songs across different percentile brackets — all with room to grow.
suggestionCategories.finishFcsDesc: Play these songs again on {{instrument}} and grab an FC!
suggestionCategories.playThisSeasonDesc: Songs you haven't played on any instrument this season.
suggestionCategories.untouchedSeasonsDesc: Songs you haven't played on any instrument in at least {{count}} seasons.
suggestionCategories.untouchedFivePlusDesc: Songs you haven't played on any instrument in at least 5 seasons.
suggestionCategories.topFiveWeightedDesc: Your top five competitive songs (weighted by number of participants) for {{instrument}}.
suggestionCategories.topFiveRawDesc: Your top five competitive songs for {{instrument}}.
suggestionCategories.unplayedInstrumentDesc: Songs you haven't played on {{instrument}} yet.
suggestionCategories.staleInstrumentDesc: {{instrument}} songs you haven't played in a while.
suggestionCategories.almostEliteInstrumentDesc: You're in the top 5% on {{instrument}} — one good run could crack the top 1%.
suggestionCategories.percentilePushInstrumentDesc: {{instrument}} scores close to the next percentile bracket.
suggestionCategories.pushTheseToGoldDesc: Try gold-starring this selection of tracks!
suggestionCategories.newOnInstrumentDesc: Songs you haven't played on {{instrument}} yet.
suggestionCategories.almostEliteOnInstrumentDesc: Your {{instrument}} scores are in the top 5% — push them into the top 1%.
suggestionCategories.percentilePushColonInstrumentDesc: Replay these {{instrument}} songs to jump to the next percentile bracket.
suggestionCategories.topBucketPushDesc: Songs with at least one instrument ranked Top {{bucket}}%. A small score bump could push you higher.
suggestionCategories.instrumentTopPushDesc: Songs ranked Top {{bucket}}% on {{instrument}}. A better score could push you into the next bracket.
suggestionCategories.breakIntoDesc: Songs where all your instruments are ranked Top {{bucket}}%. Improve any instrument to break the tie and climb to {{target}}.
suggestionCategories.playInstrumentThisSeasonDesc: Songs you haven't played on {{instrument}} this season.
suggestionCategories.instrumentUntouchedSeasonsDesc: Songs you haven't played on {{instrument}} in at least {{count}} seasons.
suggestionCategories.instrumentUntouchedFivePlusDesc: Songs you haven't played on {{instrument}} in 5 or more seasons.
suggestionCategories.untouchedFivePlusDescAlt: Songs you haven't played on any instrument in 5 or more seasons.
suggestionCategories.almostEliteDecadeDesc: You're in the top 5% on these {{decade}} songs — one good run could crack the top 1%.
suggestionCategories.almostEliteOnInstrumentDecadeDesc: Your {{instrument}} scores on these {{decade}} songs are in the top 5% — push them into the top 1%.
suggestionCategories.percentilePushDecadeDesc: These {{decade}} scores are close to the next percentile bracket — replay them to climb.
suggestionCategories.percentilePushInstrumentDecadeDesc: Replay these {{decade}} {{instrument}} songs to jump to the next percentile bracket.
